name: @ykdz/template-repository
description: Repository workspace for the YKDZ template generator.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ykdz/template-core run build && pnpm --filter @ykdz/template-builtin-source run build && pnpm --filter @ykdz/template run build && pnpm --filter @ykdz/template-checks run build
scripts.check: pnpm run check:format && pnpm run check:lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run check:generated && pnpm run check:templates
scripts.check:templates: pnpm run check:templates:shared-oxc && pnpm run check:templates:github-yaml && pnpm run check:templates:boundary && pnpm run check:templates:static-source
scripts.check:templates:shared-oxc: pnpm run check:templates:shared-oxc:format && pnpm run check:templates:shared-oxc:lint && pnpm run check:templates:shared-oxc:typecheck
